title: Where the Salt Tide Turns
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A grieving marine biologist returns to her childhood island to catalog the dying tide pools and discovers her late mother's hidden journals revealing a decades-long affair with a woman, forcing her to reconcile the mother she knew with the woman she never met.
long_description: A grieving marine biologist returns to her childhood island to catalog the dying tide pools and discovers her late mother's hidden journals revealing a decades-long affair with a woman, forcing her to reconcile the mother she knew with the woman she never met.
